title: approvals — published macros
description: This module ships NO Blueprint macros. Approval-instance + approval-decision tables use plain columns declared via the standard `AsDatabaseBlueprint` conventions from foundation. No JSONB-composition macros needed. The `context_json` + `payload_json` columns on approval_instances are simple `jsonb` types written via straightforward `$table->jsonb('context_json')` calls in the migration — no helper required.
namespace_note: The one macro this module could hypothetically ship — `Blueprint::approvableAction()` to auto-add `subject_type` + `subject_id` polymorphic pair — is intentionally skipped. Polymorphic FKs are cheap to hand-write (two columns + a composite index) and don't warrant a macro.
notes: If a future need surfaces for a common `has_approval_context()` polymorphic pair or a `has_expression()` column-pair, add the macro here + register in ApprovalServiceProvider::boot().
